shared_properties: Prisoner silhouette with shackles, tunic hem, and bent-knee descent pose.
differences: Right hand and right boot press into the contact side.
Torso leans 3 px toward the right edge.
Cloth hem lifts upward to communicate drag.

reference_images.label: slip_down_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Dungeon shaft palette, cold stone texture, vertical pressure mood, and obstacle rhythm anchor.

reference_images.label: slip_down_player
reference_images.purpose: Prisoner silhouette, fall pose, cloth volume, and shackle readability anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle and trigger this state through the same PlayerStateSprite entity that owns the fall loop.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/player_prisoner_brake_right_2f_6fps.png through AssetServer and swap to this atlas when right drag is active.
runtime_notes: The pivot matches the base fall state so animation swaps do not slide on the wall.
Brake state takes priority over the generic fall loop while right drag input is pressed.
Frame cadence slows to 6 fps to emphasize friction resistance.

context.usage: Right-wall contact pose used when the player holds the right input and drags on a high-friction surface.

shape.silhouette: Bracing prisoner silhouette with the right hand and right boot pressed toward the wall, torso leaned into drag, and cloth pulled upward by resistance.

appendages.accessories: Ankle shackles and a waist chain.

specs.texture: Shared tunic folds and iron shackle highlights.
specs.shading: Flat pixel shading with a darker right-edge contact shadow.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 32x24 px with two 16x24 frames.
Right hand and right boot remain the closest pixels to the wall-facing edge in both frames.
Torso lean changes no more than 2 px between frames, keeping collision logic stable.
